# FlockPilot

> FlockPilot is a multi-tenant poultry farm management ERP built by Enro Agro Limited. It gives poultry farmers in Nigeria and Africa a real-time operations-and-finance cockpit for profitable batches.

FlockPilot is a cloud-based SaaS platform designed specifically for poultry farm operations. It combines farm operations tracking, financial accounting, payroll, HR, and an AI assistant into one integrated system.

## Key Capabilities

- **Farm Operations**: Flock batch management, feed inventory and consumption tracking, mortality analysis, medication cost tracking, sales event management (by bird or by kg), and approval workflows.
- **Finance & Accounting**: Double-entry journal ledger, accounts payable with draft→submit→approve→pay lifecycle, chart of accounts with versioning, fiscal periods, financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, trial balance, cash flow), and AP aging reports.
- **Payroll & HR**: Payroll runs with automated deductions and allowances, PDF payslip generation and email delivery, employee directory, salary history, and department management.
- **Employee Loans**: Loan applications with credit scoring, eligibility checks, one-active-loan enforcement, and repayment tracking integrated with payroll.
- **AI Assistant**: Built-in AI chat powered by Claude that understands the user's current module context. Provides practical advice on feed management, mortality control, batch economics, and financial best practices.
- **Farm Intelligence**: Flight Deck live operational dashboard, batch profitability analysis, multi-batch comparisons, and analytics export.
- **Security**: Role-based access control with 12 roles, multi-tenant data isolation, audit trail, and configurable permissions.

## Pricing

- **Starter**: ₦25,000/month — Up to 2,000 birds, 1 farm site, 3 users
- **Growth**: ₦50,000/month — Up to 10,000 birds, 3 sites, 10 users, AI (100 msgs/mo)
- **Scale**: ₦120,000/month — Up to 50,000 birds, 10 sites, 30 users, AI (300 msgs/mo)
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — Unlimited everything, dedicated support

Annual billing saves 15%.

## Target Users

Poultry farmers, farm managers, agricultural businesses, poultry integrators, and livestock operations in Nigeria and across Africa who need structured farm management, financial tracking, and operational visibility.

## Technology

Built with NestJS, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Prisma. Deployed on Render. Multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation between organizations.
